description: C# e .NET para Termux no Android ARM64. Inclui o .NET SDK via instalação manual e csharp-ls (LSP) via dotnet tool para autocompletar e diagnósticos.

install_steps.command: pkg update -y 2>&1 && pkg install -y curl proot 2>&1

DOTNET_VERSION=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/termux-user-repository/dotnet-packages/releases/latest | grep '"tag_name"' | sed 's/.*"tag_name": "//;s/".*//' 2>/dev/null) && echo "Versão .NET disponível: $DOTNET_VERSION" && curl -L "https://github.com/termux-user-repository/dotnet-packages/releases/latest/download/dotnet-sdk-arm64.tar.gz" -o /tmp/dotnet.tar.gz 2>&1 && mkdir -p $HOME/.dotnet && tar -xzf /tmp/dotnet.tar.gz -C $HOME/.dotnet 2>&1 && rm /tmp/dotnet.tar.gz && echo 'OK: .NET SDK extraído'

grep -qxF 'export DOTNET_ROOT="$HOME/.dotnet"' $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export DOTNET_ROOT="$HOME/.dotnet"' >> $HOME/.bashrc; grep -qxF 'export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet:$HOME/.dotnet/tools"' $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet:$HOME/.dotnet/tools"' >> $HOME/.bashrc
export DOTNET_ROOT=$HOME/.dotnet && export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet && dotnet --version 2>&1 && echo 'OK: dotnet OK'
export DOTNET_ROOT=$HOME/.dotnet && export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet:$HOME/.dotnet/tools && dotnet tool install --global csharp-ls 2>&1 && echo 'OK: csharp-ls instalado'

config_steps.command: test -f $HOME/.dotnet/tools/csharp-ls && echo 'csharp-ls OK' || echo 'AVISO: csharp-ls não encontrado'

uninstall_steps.command: export DOTNET_ROOT=$HOME/.dotnet && export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet:$HOME/.dotnet/tools && dotnet tool uninstall --global csharp-ls 2>&1 || true

sdk_config.new_project_cmd: dotnet new console -n $name && cd $name && echo 'OK: projeto C# criado'
